target_audience: 25-45岁男女，有家庭/子女的中青年人群
viral_reason: 先抑后扬反转催泪——全员误解父亲→真相是主动背骂名救女儿，父爱隐忍牺牲戳中大众软肋
matched_pattern: 先抑后扬 + 情感共鸣
matched_emotion_curve: 曲线A「过山车」：冲突→压抑→铺垫→反转爆发→温暖收尾

rows.plotDescription: 老旧居民楼前，中年男主被街坊围堵在墙角，午后阴天冷调青灰光线，手持晃动镜头（运镜：手持晃动；首镜）
rows.characterAction: 男主被多人指着，眼神低垂看向地面，嘴角紧抿不辩解，攥紧的拳头指节发白
rows.sceneTags: 老旧居民楼前/斑驳墙面/阴天
rows.lightingAndAtmosphere: 冷调青灰光线，高对比，人脸半明半暗
rows.audioEffects: 嘈杂人声白噪音，低沉弦乐起
rows.artDirection: 写实生活化，灰暗冷色调，人物穿着朴素旧衣

characters.characterDescription: A middle-aged Chinese man in his 40s with tired bloodshot eyes, light stubble, messy hair, wearing a worn-out grey shirt, rough calloused hands, hunched shoulders

rows.imageGenerationPrompt: A middle-aged Chinese man in his 40s with tired bloodshot eyes and light stubble, wearing a worn-out grey shirt, cornered by a crowd against a wall in front of old residential buildings, overcast afternoon, cold blue-grey lighting, handheld camera close-up, high contrast, half his face in shadow, cinematic realistic style, 8K
rows.videoMotionPrompt: Shaky handheld close-up; the man stands still with downcast eyes while people point at him; subtle micro-expressions of suppressed anger; camera slightly wobbles to enhance tension

rows.plotDescription: 从人群愤怒指责的脸摇移到男主沉默的侧脸，焦点切换（运镜：摇移；沿用镜1场景）
rows.characterAction: 男主不躲闪不辩解，舌尖顶住脸颊内侧克制愤怒，肩膀微微颤抖
rows.dialogue: 为了钱连亲生女儿都不管，心太狠了！
rows.sceneTags: 老旧居民楼前/人群手指
rows.lightingAndAtmosphere: 冷调硬光，人脸半明半暗，增强冲突压迫感
rows.audioEffects: 尖利女声指责+嘈杂附和声，BGM加重低音
rows.artDirection: 写实风格，高对比光影，突出冲突张力

characters.characterDescription: A middle-aged Chinese man in his 40s with tired bloodshot eyes, light stubble, messy hair, wearing a worn-out grey shirt

rows.imageGenerationPrompt: A middle-aged Chinese man in a worn-out grey shirt, standing silently as angry neighbors point and shout at him, dark cold lighting, half his face in shadow, high contrast, camera pans from the shouting crowd to his stoic expression, realistic style, shallow depth of field, 8K
rows.videoMotionPrompt: Camera pans slowly from crowd to the man's face; the man's jaw tightens, shoulders tremble slightly, he doesn't fight back; focus transitions from crowd to his eyes

rows.plotDescription: 家中客厅争吵，昏黄室内灯光，墙上贴着女儿的诊断书（运镜：固定；场景转换）
rows.characterAction: 妻子崩溃质问，摔碎水杯，男主全程沉默坐在桌边，双手交叉放在桌上
rows.dialogue: 你倒是说句话啊！女儿还在医院躺着！
rows.sceneTags: 老旧客厅/诊断书贴墙/碎水杯
rows.lightingAndAtmosphere: 昏黄室内灯光，温暖但压抑，阴影深重
rows.audioEffects: 摔杯声+妻子哭喊，BGM转为沉重钢琴
rows.artDirection: 室内生活化场景，暖黄但低饱和，细节破旧家具

characters.characterDescription: A middle-aged Chinese man in worn grey shirt, sitting at a table with clasped hands, head slightly bowed
A Chinese woman in her 30s, disheveled hair, red-eyed from crying, wearing a simple plain dress, desperate expression

rows.imageGenerationPrompt: Interior of a modest living room at dusk, a middle-aged man sits silently at a table in a worn grey shirt, hands clasped, a woman with disheveled hair and red eyes stands crying, broken glass on floor, hospital papers taped on wall, warm amber low light, heavy shadows, cinematic realistic style, 8K
rows.videoMotionPrompt: Static wide shot of the room; the woman screams and throws a cup; the man remains motionless; slow zoom on his clasped hands

rows.plotDescription: 男主独自蹲在医院走廊尽头，手里夹着未点燃的烟，双手发抖（运镜：固定；场景转医院）
rows.characterAction: 男主靠墙蹲下，把脸埋进手臂里，肩膀无声抽动，克制不哭出声
rows.sceneTags: 医院走廊/白炽灯/消毒水味
rows.lightingAndAtmosphere: 冷白医院灯光，惨白孤寂
rows.audioEffects: 医院环境音+心跳声，BGM低音渐起
rows.artDirection: 医院真实场景，冷白荧光灯，白色墙面，空荡走廊

characters.characterDescription: Same middle-aged man now in hospital corridor, grey shirt wrinkled, hair more disheveled, eyes hollow

rows.imageGenerationPrompt: A middle-aged Chinese man in a wrinkled grey shirt crouching alone at the end of a hospital corridor, face buried in his arms, fluorescent white lights casting cold shadows, empty hallway stretching behind him, lonely atmosphere, cinematic realistic style, shallow depth of field, 8K
rows.videoMotionPrompt: Static close-up slowly pushes in; the man's shoulders shake silently as he suppresses sobs; a single tear drops onto the floor

rows.plotDescription: 深夜，男主在工地搬砖/做兼职的蒙太奇，月冷光，瘦削背影（运镜：跟随；场景转工地夜）
rows.characterAction: 男主扛重物弯腰行走，汗水浸透衬衫，咬牙坚持的侧脸
rows.lightingAndAtmosphere: 冷蓝月光+工地探照灯，高反差
rows.audioEffects: 工地环境音+重物落地声，BGM沉重渐强
rows.artDirection: 城市工地夜景，蓝冷调，写实劳动场景

characters.characterDescription: Same man now in work clothes, sweat-soaked shirt, exhausted but determined expression, carrying heavy loads

rows.imageGenerationPrompt: Night at a construction site, a middle-aged Chinese man in sweat-soaked clothes carrying heavy materials, cold blue moonlight and harsh work lights, exhausted but determined expression, sweat dripping from his face, cinematic realistic style, high contrast, 8K
rows.videoMotionPrompt: Camera follows the man as he walks bent under a load; slow tracking shot shows his strained muscles and gritted teeth

rows.plotDescription: 男主在昏暗房间里签下一份协议，手指颤抖，笔尖迟疑（运镜：固定推进）
rows.characterAction: 男主盯着协议看了很久，深吸一口气，签字，闭眼，一滴泪滑落
rows.dialogue: 入局之后我这辈子都要背负骂名，但只要她能活，值。
rows.sceneTags: 昏暗房间/协议文件/台灯
rows.lightingAndAtmosphere: 一盏台灯暖光聚焦协议，周围黑暗，伦勃朗式布光
rows.audioEffects: 笔尖划纸声+深呼吸，BGM钢琴渐高
rows.artDirection: 极简暗室，单光源聚焦，电影感布光

characters.characterDescription: A middle-aged Chinese man, face half-lit by a desk lamp, tired eyes with tears, old shirt sleeves rolled up

rows.imageGenerationPrompt: Close-up of a middle-aged Chinese man's hands trembling as he signs a document under a single desk lamp, Rembrandt lighting with warm light on the paper and darkness around, his face half-lit, a tear rolling down his cheek, cinematic dramatic style, 8K
rows.videoMotionPrompt: Slow push-in on signing hands; the pen hesitates then moves; camera tilts up to his face as a tear falls; shallow focus on the document

rows.plotDescription: 医院病房走廊，医生告诉妻子治疗费已凑齐，妻子震惊困惑（运镜：固定；场景转医院白天）
rows.characterAction: 妻子瞪大眼睛，捂住嘴，难以置信
rows.sceneTags: 医院走廊白天/医生白大褂
rows.lightingAndAtmosphere: 自然白光+暖光透过病房窗户
rows.audioEffects: 环境安静，BGM暂停→准备进入反转
rows.artDirection: 医院白天明亮场景，色调开始转暖

characters.characterDescription: A Chinese woman in her 30s, exhausted but hopeful, hospital clothes, disheveled hair

rows.imageGenerationPrompt: Hospital corridor in daytime, a Chinese woman in her 30s in simple clothes looks at a doctor with shock and confusion, warm sunlight streaming through windows, hopeful atmosphere, cinematic realistic style, 8K
rows.videoMotionPrompt: Static shot; the woman's expression changes from confusion to dawning realization; subtle zoom on her face

rows.plotDescription: 知情老人出现，说出全部真相，门外男主偷听（运镜：缓慢摇移；场景转走廊转角）
rows.characterAction: 老人叹息说出真相；门外男主靠墙低头，默默擦泪，不敢进去相见
rows.dialogue: 你丈夫为了凑手术费，答应背下所有骂名…他不让告诉你们，就是怕你们娘俩被流言伤到啊。
rows.sceneTags: 医院走廊转角/老人/偷听
rows.lightingAndAtmosphere: 暖光从窗户照进，照亮老人，门外的男主半身在阴影里
rows.audioEffects: BGM骤停→静默1秒→催泪钢琴起
rows.artDirection: 暖调开始占据画面，象征真相的光芒

characters.characterDescription: Same man, leaning against the wall outside the door, crying silently, wiping tears with his rough hand
An elderly Chinese man, kind wrinkled face, simple clothes, gentle voice

rows.imageGenerationPrompt: Hospital corridor warm with sunlight, an elderly Chinese man speaks seriously to a woman, warm golden light streaming through windows; in the background through a doorway, the silhouette of a man leaning against the wall wiping tears, half in shadow, emotional cinematic scene, 8K
rows.videoMotionPrompt: Slow pan from the elder speaking to the door frame where the man is listening; the man silently cries and wipes his face with his hand; camera lingers on his trembling hand

rows.plotDescription: 妻子冲出病房，看到丈夫在走廊尽头，崩溃大哭奔向他（运镜：快速推进）
rows.characterAction: 妻子跑向丈夫，捶打他胸口然后紧紧抱住，丈夫抬手轻轻拍她的背
rows.dialogue: 你为什么不告诉我…你个傻子…
rows.lightingAndAtmosphere: 暖金色阳光洒满走廊，色调由冷转暖完成
rows.audioEffects: 催泪钢琴高潮，轻微的哭声
rows.artDirection: 色调明显转暖，金色阳光象征救赎与理解

characters.characterDescription: A middle-aged Chinese man crying, rough hands gently patting his wife's back, worn grey shirt, tired but relieved eyes
A Chinese woman embracing him, face buried in his chest, crying, disheveled hair

rows.imageGenerationPrompt: Hospital corridor bathed in warm golden sunlight, a Chinese woman crying as she embraces a middle-aged man, his rough hands gently patting her back, both in simple worn clothes, emotional embrace, cinematic realism, shallow depth of field, warm amber tones, 8K
rows.videoMotionPrompt: Quick push-in as the woman runs to embrace him; camera circles slightly around the hugging couple; subtle slow-motion effect on the embrace

rows.plotDescription: 一家三口在病房手牵手，女儿躺在病床上脸色好转，阳光洒在病床上（运镜：稳定推远）
rows.characterAction: 三人手牵手，男主看着女儿微笑，妻子靠在他肩上，女儿露出虚弱的笑容
rows.dialogue: 你只管好好养病，所有骂名，爸爸一个人扛。
rows.lightingAndAtmosphere: 暖金阳光布满房间，柔光漫射，温馨治愈
rows.audioEffects: 钢琴收尾渐弱，环境安静温暖
rows.artDirection: 暖色调完全主导，柔和明亮，象征新的开始

characters.characterDescription: A middle-aged Chinese man, tired but smiling gently, holding his daughter's hand
A Chinese woman resting her head on her husband's shoulder, peaceful expression
A young girl about 8-10 years old lying in hospital bed, weak but smiling, pale face with slight color returning

rows.imageGenerationPrompt: Sunlit hospital room, a family of three holding hands by the bed, warm golden light streaming through window, a young girl in hospital bed smiling weakly, the man holding her hand gently, the woman resting on his shoulder, hope and warmth, cinematic soft lighting, shallow depth of field, 8K
rows.videoMotionPrompt: Camera slowly pulls back from the family; gentle push-out revealing the full scene; warm light fills the frame; subtle slow zoom out

rows.plotDescription: 黑底白字浮现核心文案（运镜：固定）
rows.dialogue: 你只管救女儿，骂名我来背。
rows.lightingAndAtmosphere: 纯黑背景，白色宋体字居中
rows.audioEffects: 钢琴最后一个音符，余韵留白2秒
rows.artDirection: 极简文字画面，留白收尾
rows.imageGenerationPrompt: Pure black background with white Chinese calligraphy-style text centered: '你只管救女儿，骂名我来背', clean minimal typography, cinematic letterbox format, emotional pause, 8K
rows.videoMotionPrompt: Static shot; the text slowly fades in with a 2-second pause at the end
